data.title: Lerøy Seafood Group to Announce Q1 2025 Results
data.description:
Leroy Seafood Group ASA ( (GB:0GM2) ) has provided an announcement.

Lerøy Seafood Group ASA will announce its first-quarter results for 2025 on May 15, with a presentation at the Continental Hotel in Oslo. The event will include a seafood buffet and a webcast option for remote participants, reflecting the company’s commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement.

More about Leroy Seafood Group ASA

Lerøy Seafood Group ASA operates in the seafood industry, focusing on the production and distribution of seafood products. The company is known for its comprehensive seafood offerings and has a significant presence in the global market.

data.title: Sera Prognostics Reports Q1 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Sera Prognostics, Inc. ( (SERA) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Sera Prognostics, Inc. presented to its investors.

Sera Prognostics, Inc., headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah, is a health diagnostics company specializing in precision pregnancy care, focusing on early prediction of preterm birth risk and other pregnancy complications through innovative biomarker tests.

In its first quarter of 2025 earnings report, Sera Prognostics announced a revenue of $38,000, marking an improvement from the previous year’s nil revenue for the same period. The company highlighted its strategic initiatives, including engaging with Medicaid plans for its PreTRM test and preparing for a significant presence at the upcoming ACOG 2025 Annual Clinical & Scientific Meeting.

Key financial metrics for the quarter included total operating expenses of $9.3 million, a slight increase from $9.1 million in the previous year, and a net loss of $8.2 million compared to $8.1 million in the prior-year quarter. Research and development expenses decreased by approximately 9% due to reduced clinical study costs, while selling, general, and administrative expenses rose as the company invested in strategic growth initiatives.

Looking forward, Sera Prognostics remains committed to leveraging the results of its PRIME study to engage with healthcare providers and expand the adoption of its PreTRM test. The company aims to demonstrate the test’s potential in improving healthcare outcomes and reducing costs, particularly in regions heavily impacted by premature births.

data.title: Immunocore Holdings Reports Strong Q1 2025 Performance
data.description:
Immunocore Holdings Plc ( (IMCR) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Immunocore Holdings Plc presented to its investors.

Immunocore Holdings Plc is a biotechnology company based in the United Kingdom, specializing in the development of innovative immunotherapies for cancer, infectious diseases, and autoimmune diseases using its proprietary ImmTAX platform.

In its latest earnings report for the first quarter of 2025, Immunocore Holdings Plc reported a significant increase in revenue, driven primarily by the sales of its lead product, KIMMTRAK, which is now approved in 39 countries and commercially launched in 26. The company also highlighted its strategic focus on expanding market reach and obtaining further regulatory approvals.

Key financial metrics from the report include a total revenue of $93.9 million, up from $70.5 million in the same period last year, and a net income of $5.0 million compared to a net loss of $24.4 million in the previous year. The increase in revenue is attributed to the strong performance of KIMMTRAK in the United States and Europe. Additionally, the company reported a solid cash position with cash and cash equivalents totaling $476.8 million.

Immunocore’s management remains optimistic about the future, focusing on expanding the reach of KIMMTRAK and advancing its pipeline of innovative therapies. The company is committed to maintaining its growth trajectory by continuing to seek regulatory approvals in new territories and enhancing its product offerings.

Looking ahead, Immunocore Holdings Plc aims to leverage its robust financial position and strategic initiatives to drive further growth and innovation in the biotechnology sector, with a particular emphasis on expanding its market presence and developing new therapeutic candidates.

data.title: LivePerson Reports Q1 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Liveperson ( (LPSN) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Liveperson presented to its investors.

LivePerson, Inc. is a prominent provider of enterprise conversational AI and digital transformation solutions, serving major global brands with its innovative platform. In the first quarter of 2025, LivePerson reported a total revenue of $64.7 million, which, despite being above the midpoint of their guidance range, marked a 24% decrease from the previous year due to customer cancellations and downsells. The company signed 50 deals, including expansions with major clients like IBM and new agreements with significant retailers and digital entertainment firms.

Key financial metrics revealed a net loss of $14.1 million, a significant improvement from the $35.6 million loss in the same quarter last year. The adjusted EBITDA was slightly positive at $0.2 million, showing resilience amidst challenges. The average revenue per customer increased by 2.4%, indicating strong performance in customer retention and expansion efforts.

LivePerson’s strategic focus on AI and digital transformation continues to drive growth, with the upcoming integration with Amazon Connect and increased adoption of its Generative AI suite. The company remains committed to enhancing its offerings to meet the evolving needs of its clients, particularly in regulated industries where AI risk and compliance are crucial.

Looking ahead, LivePerson’s management anticipates a challenging second quarter with projected revenue between $57 million and $60 million, reflecting a year-over-year decline. However, the company remains optimistic about its long-term strategy and its ability to adapt to market demands, aiming for sustained momentum in its business operations.

data.title: NewtekOne, Inc. Reports Strong Q1 2025 Earnings
data.description:
Newtek Business Services ( (NEWT) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Newtek Business Services presented to its investors.

NewtekOne, Inc., a financial holding company, provides a comprehensive range of business and financial solutions to independent business owners across the United States, including banking, lending, and technology services.

In its latest earnings report for the first quarter of 2025, NewtekOne, Inc. announced a diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $0.35, surpassing its projected range of $0.28 to $0.32. The company highlighted its strong balance sheet growth and above-average profitability despite a challenging economic environment.

Key financial metrics for the quarter included a 13.2% year-over-year increase in book value per common share, reaching $10.73, and a 47% year-over-year rise in pre-provision net revenue (PPNR) to $25.2 million. The efficiency ratio improved to 62.1% from 70.6% in the previous year, and the company reported a return on average assets of 1.81% and a return on average equity of 12.7%. Additionally, NewtekOne’s SBA 7(a) loan originations were approximately $213.4 million, and the company executed a significant ALP loan securitization post-quarter.

Looking ahead, NewtekOne forecasts annual EPS growth of 17% for 2025, with expectations of significant loan and deposit growth. The company remains optimistic about its unique business model and its ability to deliver value to independent business owners nationwide, supported by a seasoned management team and diverse revenue streams.

data.title: One Stop Systems Reports Q1 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
One Stop Systems ( (OSS) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information One Stop Systems presented to its investors.

One Stop Systems, Inc. is a Delaware-based company specializing in the design, manufacture, and marketing of rugged high-performance computing systems for edge applications, particularly in the AI and machine learning sectors, with a focus on military and industrial applications.

In its latest earnings report for the quarter ending March 31, 2025, One Stop Systems reported a decline in revenue compared to the same period last year, with a total revenue of $12.26 million, down from $12.65 million. The company also recorded a net loss of $2.02 million, which is a deeper loss compared to the $1.34 million loss reported in the first quarter of 2024.

Key financial metrics indicate a challenging quarter for One Stop Systems. The company experienced a decrease in product revenue and an increase in operating expenses, which contributed to the overall loss. Despite these challenges, the company maintained a stable cash position with $6.5 million in cash and cash equivalents. Additionally, the company has been focusing on strategic initiatives, including increasing its presence in the military and defense sectors.

Looking ahead, One Stop Systems plans to continue its focus on developing edge computing solutions and expanding its market presence in the defense sector. The company aims to navigate the current economic uncertainties by controlling costs and introducing new products that leverage AI capabilities for military and industrial applications.

data.title: ACV Auctions Reports Strong Q1 2025 Revenue Growth
data.description:
Acv Auctions, Inc. ( (ACVA) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Acv Auctions, Inc. presented to its investors.

ACV Auctions, Inc. is a prominent digital automotive marketplace and data services provider, catering to dealers and commercial clients with a suite of innovative solutions for sourcing, selling, and managing used vehicles.

In its first quarter of 2025, ACV Auctions reported robust revenue growth, with revenues reaching $183 million, a 25% increase from the previous year. The company also achieved an adjusted EBITDA of $14 million, surpassing the high-end of its guidance. Despite a GAAP net loss of $15 million, the company recorded a non-GAAP net income of $7 million, reflecting its strategic focus on expanding market share and enhancing dealer solutions.

Key highlights from the quarter include a 28% increase in marketplace and service revenue, a 19% rise in marketplace units to 208,025, and a marketplace GMV of $2.6 billion, up 13% year-over-year. ACV’s strategic initiatives to support its commercial wholesale strategy and its leading market position contributed to these gains, despite challenges such as the ongoing shortage of used vehicle inventory.

Looking forward, ACV Auctions maintains its 2025 guidance, expecting total revenue between $765 million and $785 million, representing a 20% to 23% year-over-year growth. The company anticipates a GAAP net loss of $50 million to $60 million and an adjusted EBITDA of $65 million to $75 million, as it continues to navigate the evolving macroeconomic environment and execute its growth strategies.

data.title: Metrics Income Opportunities Trust Reports NTA Update
data.description:
Metrics Income Opportunities Trust Units ( (AU:MOT) ) just unveiled an announcement.

The Metrics Income Opportunities Trust announced an unaudited Net Tangible Asset Backing (NTA) per share of $2.1484 as of May 7, 2025. This figure reflects the trust’s ongoing commitment to its investment objective of generating monthly cash income while managing risks and preserving capital. The announcement underscores the trust’s strategic focus on private credit and other financial instruments, which may provide potential upside gains for investors.

More about Metrics Income Opportunities Trust Units

Metrics Income Opportunities Trust operates within the financial services industry, focusing on providing monthly cash income and preserving investor capital through investments in private credit and other assets like warrants, options, preference shares, and equity. The Trust Company (RE Services) Limited, part of the Perpetual group, acts as the responsible entity, with Perpetual offering services in funds management, financial advisory, and trustee services.

data.title: Unitil Corporation Reports Solid Q1 2025 Earnings
data.description:
Unitil ( (UTL) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Unitil presented to its investors.

Unitil Corporation is a public utility holding company based in Hampton, New Hampshire, primarily engaged in the local distribution of electricity and gas across New Hampshire, Massachusetts, and Maine. The company operates through its subsidiaries, providing essential utility services to a substantial customer base in these regions.

In its latest earnings report for the first quarter of 2025, Unitil Corporation reported a slight increase in net income, reaching $27.5 million, or $1.69 per share, compared to the same period in 2024. The company’s adjusted net income, which excludes transaction-related costs, was $28.4 million, reflecting a positive performance driven by higher rates and customer growth.

Key financial highlights include a notable increase in gas adjusted gross margin by $9.9 million, attributed to higher rates, customer growth, and colder winter weather. Electric adjusted gross margin also saw a modest increase, supported by higher distribution rates. However, the company faced increased operation and maintenance expenses, primarily due to higher utility operating costs and acquisition-related expenses.

Looking ahead, Unitil Corporation remains focused on maintaining its robust financial health and operational efficiency. The company’s management is optimistic about its ability to navigate future challenges and continue delivering value to its customers and shareholders, supported by its strategic investments and regulatory framework.
